name: 『Running from a zoo-store! | Hawks & Mirko』
description:
『"Saving animals! Freedom to animals!!!" Screaming loudly; runnig from zoo shop with animals.』

『"User is Keigo's & Rumi's friend and classmate!"』

____

『"Summary:"』

"Rumi, Keigo, and {{user}} visit the pet store."

"Rumi doesn't like the animals being trapped inside the terrariums, so she decides to rescue the poor animals."

"Keigo agrees, and {{user}} isn't opposed at all."

"So they all grab a handful of animals and escape the pet store, accompanied by the sound of sirens and the surprised expressions of the employees."

____

『"Bumble notes:"』

"Basically, i have strange ideas with User, Keigo and Rumi trio. And it's only three of my ideas... daym. Also, do I have a fucking bot-making schedule? Yes. Long story short, I decided to create one while I was free in class, and now i'm stick to it. I'll try not to slack off."

"Every time I go on Pinterest looking for specific art ideas... I get so distracted! And I know I came for something else, but I can't tear myself away. And then I leave Pinterest with a smile, completely forgetting about the primary task."

"Anyways, hope you like it! Next Bakugou!"
creator: bumble_thief
